prestazioni: Replace the original **OSCA Tipo 1600 (MT4-1100)** 1.6L inline-4 with a **FIA-homologated 2.0L stroker kit** using a **Forgestar F14 83mm crankshaft**, **JE Pistons 9.5:1 forged slugs (P/N 361880)**, and **Manley H-beam connecting rods (P/N 15002-4)** to achieve **185+ HP at 7,800 RPM** on **VP Racing C16 fuel** with a **TWM ITB (Individual Throttle Body) kit** featuring **4x 45mm Jenvey throttle bodies (P/N DCOE-45)** and **K&N RC-1005 air filters**

Install a **Tial 38mm wastegate (P/N MV-R)** and **Garrett GT2860RS-5 turbocharger** with a **custom 3.5-inch stainless steel exhaust system** using **Bosal 226-200 76mm primary tubes** and a **SuperSprint 200-cell metallic catalytic converter (P/N 008067N)** to maintain **FIA Group 4 compliance** while pushing **220 HP at 1.2 bar boost**

Upgrade the **original 4-speed gearbox** to a **Hewland LD200 5-speed dog-ring transmission** with **OS Giken 1.5-way LSD (P/N OS G-15)** and **Quaife ATB differential (P/N QDF7J)** paired with a **Tilton 7.25-inch twin-plate clutch (P/N 10-100)** and **Spec Stage 4+ pressure plate (P/N SSP4+)** for **0-60 mph in 5.2s**
estetica: Replace the stock steel body with a **custom aluminum widebody kit** by **Auto Ricambi Zagato**, featuring **riveted fender flares (P/N ARZ-1600GT-FF)** and **carbon fiber doors (P/N ARZ-1600GT-CF-DOOR)** to reduce weight by **45 kg** while maintaining **1960s GT proportions**

Install a **Rear Wing: Custom **OSCA 1600 GT-specific** **Voltex Type-3 GT wing (P/N VX-1600GT)** in **2x2 carbon fiber** with **adjustable aluminum pedestals (P/N VX-ADJ-ALU)** for **downforce tuning up to 180 kg at 120 mph**, paired with a **custom front splitter** by **Aeroform Composites (P/N AF-1600GT-SPLIT)** in **3K twill carbon fiber**

Fit **BBS RS-GT 15x8 ET15 wheels** with **Pirelli P Zero Corsa (205/50R15)** tires, wrapped in **custom OSCA-branded center caps (P/N OSCA-1600GT-CAP)** and **H&R Trak+10 wheel spacers (P/N 5465810)** for **flush fitment**, complemented by **Brembo GT 4-piston calipers (P/N 09.9604.72)** with **330mm slotted rotors (P/N 09.8905.11)** and **Ferodo DS2500 pads (P/N FDB1617)**
